52	type executionCleanupTestProbe struct {
53		live           map[string]bool
54		reason         string
55		ignoreRunState bool
56	}
57	
58	func (p executionCleanupTestProbe) IsLive(meta ExecutionCleanupMetadata, runState *RunState, now time.Time) (bool, string) {
59		_ = now
60		if meta.Preserved {
61			return true, "preserved metadata"
62		}
63		key := filepath.Clean(meta.WorktreePath)
64		if key == "." || key == "" {
65			key = meta.AttemptID
66		}
67		if p.live != nil && p.live[key] {
68			if strings.TrimSpace(p.reason) != "" {
69				return true, p.reason
70			}
71			return true, "live"
72		}
73		if !p.ignoreRunState && runState != nil && runState.WorktreePath != "" && filepath.Clean(runState.WorktreePath) == filepath.Clean(meta.WorktreePath) {
74			return true, "run-state live"
75		}
76		return false, "stale"
77	}

79	func writeExecutionCleanupCandidate(t *testing.T, dir string, meta ExecutionCleanupMetadata, files map[string]string) {
80		t.Helper()
81		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(dir, 0o755))
82		require.NoError(t, WriteExecutionCleanupMetadata(dir, meta))
83		for name, contents := range files {
84			require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, name), []byte(contents), 0o644))
85		}
86	}

103	func TestExecutionCleanup_RemovesStaleUnregisteredDDXTempDirs(t *testing.T) {
104		projectRoot := setupExecutionCleanupProjectRoot(t)
105		tempRoot := t.TempDir()
106	
107		stalePath := filepath.Join(tempRoot, ExecuteBeadWtPrefix+"ddx-stale-20260506T154739-deadbeef")
108		livePath := filepath.Join(tempRoot, ExecuteBeadWtPrefix+"ddx-live-20260506T154739-feedface")
109		otherPath := filepath.Join(tempRoot, "plain-tmp-dir")
110	
111		writeExecutionCleanupCandidate(t, stalePath, ExecutionCleanupMetadata{
112			ProjectRoot:  projectRoot,
113			BeadID:       "ddx-stale",
114			AttemptID:    "20260506T154739-deadbeef",
115			WorktreePath: stalePath,
116		}, map[string]string{"scratch.txt": "stale\n"})
117		writeExecutionCleanupCandidate(t, livePath, ExecutionCleanupMetadata{
118			ProjectRoot:  projectRoot,
119			BeadID:       "ddx-live",
120			AttemptID:    "20260506T154739-feedface",
121			WorktreePath: livePath,
122		}, map[string]string{"scratch.txt": "live\n"})
123		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(otherPath, 0o755))
124		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(otherPath, "ignore.txt"), []byte("keep\n"), 0o644))
125	
126		mgr := NewExecutionCleanupManager(projectRoot, &executionCleanupTestGitOps{})
127		mgr.TempRoot = tempRoot
128		mgr.Probe = executionCleanupTestProbe{
129			live: map[string]bool{
130				filepath.Clean(livePath): true,
131			},
132		}
133	
134		summary, err := mgr.Cleanup(context.Background())
135		require.NoError(t, err)
136	
137		assert.NoFileExists(t, stalePath)
138		assert.DirExists(t, livePath)
139		assert.DirExists(t, otherPath)
140		assert.Equal(t, int64(1), summary.RemovedUnregisteredTempDirs)
141		assert.NotZero(t, summary.BytesReclaimed)
142		assert.NotZero(t, summary.InodesReclaimed)
143		require.NotEmpty(t, summary.Observations)
144		assert.True(t, hasObservationClass(summary.Observations, "removed_unregistered_temp_dir"))
145	}

func TestCleanupCommand_ReportsScratchReclamation(t *testing.T) {
	projectRoot, _ := setupCleanupCommandProject(t)
	scratchRoot := t.TempDir()
	t.Setenv("DDX_SCRATCH_ROOT", scratchRoot)

	// Create a stale scratch dir with an allowlisted DDx prefix.
	staleScratch := filepath.Join(scratchRoot, "ddx-fixture-cmd-reclaim-test")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(staleScratch, 0o755))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(staleScratch, "payload.txt"), []byte("stale scratch\n"), 0o644))
	// Make it appear old enough (DefaultScratchMinAge = 2 h) via Chtimes.
	oldTime := time.Now().Add(-4 * time.Hour)
	require.NoError(t, os.Chtimes(staleScratch, oldTime, oldTime))

	// JSON output includes scratch dir counts and reclaimed bytes/inodes.
	root := NewCommandFactory(projectRoot).NewRootCommand()
	jsonOut, err := executeCommand(root, "cleanup", "--json")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	var report cleanupCommandJSON
	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(jsonOut), &report))
	assert.Equal(t, int64(1), report.RemovedScratchDirs, "JSON: removed_scratch_dirs")
	assert.Greater(t, report.ScratchBytesReclaimed, int64(0), "JSON: scratch_bytes_reclaimed")
	assert.Greater(t, report.ScratchInodesReclaimed, int64(0), "JSON: scratch_inodes_reclaimed")

	// Human-readable output also mentions scratch dirs.
	root2 := NewCommandFactory(projectRoot).NewRootCommand()
	humanOut, err := executeCommand(root2, "cleanup")
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Contains(t, humanOut, "scratch dir(s)")
}

data.text:
All 4 AC tests pass and the commit is made. Here's a summary of what was done:

**`cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup.go`** — core changes:
- Added `DDXScratchCleanupPrefixes` allowlist (`ddx-fixture-`, `ddx-e2e-`, `ddx-test-`, `ddx-testbin-`) and `DefaultScratchMinAge` (2h)
- Extended `ExecutionCleanupSummary` with `RemovedScratchDirs`, `PreservedActiveScratchDirs`, `ScratchBytesReclaimed`, `ScratchInodesReclaimed`
- Extended `ExecutionCleanupManager` with `ScratchRoot`, `ScratchPrefixes`, `ScratchMinAge` fields
- Fixed ownership-mismatch branch: checks if the foreign `project_root` still exists on disk; if not (expired temp test dir), falls through to normal liveness/stale checks instead of unconditionally preserving
- Added `cleanupScratchDirs` method (age check → liveness probe → reclaim) and `hasDDXScratchPrefix` helper

**`cli/cmd/cleanup.go`** — extended `cleanupCommandReport` with the 4 new scratch fields, reads `DDX_SCRATCH_ROOT` env var, adds scratch lines to human output

**Tests** — 3 new tests in `execution_cleanup_test.go` + 1 in `cleanup_test.go`, all passing; no regressions in the existing cleanup test suite (12/12 pass)
